snippet.title: All the Prime Minister‚Äôs Men  | Al Jazeera Investigations
snippet.description:
An explosive investigation reveals how a criminal gang is colluding with the security forces of Bangladesh and has links to Prime Minister Sheikh Hasina.

Undercover reporters with the I-Unit expose how a former street mafia claims to have captured a state. The brother of Bangladesh‚Äôs army chief boasts that he can use police and paramilitary units to abduct rivals and earn millions in bribes.

Documents obtained by the I-Unit also show that head of the army has helped a convicted killer evade justice. And how the country‚Äôs military intelligence service has secretly bought spyware from Israel ‚Äì a country that Bangladesh does not recognise ‚Äì that can monitor the prime minister‚Äôs political rivals. 

The I-Unit invited all those involved in this investigation to respond to our findings. They included Bangladesh‚Äôs Prime Minister, Home Minister, Inspector General, Police Commissioner and all four Ahmed Brothers. 

None responded to our inquiries.

After the release of the investigation, Bangladesh‚Äôs Ministry of Foreign Affairs issued a statement describing our findings as a ‚Äúsmear campaign‚Äù that was orchestrated by opponents of the regime based abroad.
It dismissed statements made by the brother of Bangladesh‚Äôs Chief of Army Staff s baseless and said Haris Ahmed had no links to Prime Minister Sheikh Hasina or any other state institution.

snippet.description:
Al Jazeera‚Äôs Investigative Unit has uncovered a criminal network colluding with the security forces of Bangladesh which is profiting from powerful links with the country‚Äôs prime minister.
Our investigation found evidence that General Aziz Ahmed, head of the Bangladesh Army, helped criminals to evade justice and make money from state corruption. 
Al Jazeera's Will Thorne has this exclusive report.

snippet.title: 3D PEN VS GLUE GUN! 17 Cool Hacks And Crafts For You
snippet.description:
We‚Äôve tried every 3D pen and hot glue craft we could imagine, and here‚Äôs what we created. Aren‚Äôt 3D pens just amazing? You can create anything you can think of, make it colorful and give it purpose. Today, we wanted to experiment with something new, and we wanted to show you some amazing hacks you can create at home. But first, let‚Äôs try some experiments with hot glue. Why buy a bath mat when you can make a colorful one with glitter using hot glue? To make it look store-bought, use a printed pattern and some greaseproof paper on top. Sometimes charging your phone becomes a nuisance, so today, we show you how to create a stand for your phone using a 3D pen. But for those of you who want to get craftier, we show you how to make a beautiful romantic ring from scratch using a 3D pen. Watch until the end to discover some fantastic tricks and crafts you‚Äôll adore. 

Timestamps: 

1:06 ‚Äî How to fix a broken wood piece 

2:25 ‚Äî DIY ring 

2:48 ‚Äî Beautiful, DIY jewelry holder 

4:15 ‚Äî DIY hair comb 

6:53 ‚Äî Cute DIY earrings 

9:03 ‚Äî DIY fake nails

Well, to help you out, I wanted to share with you some amazing hacks that will save you time and the hassle that comes with taking care of a little one. Painting is everyone‚Äôs favorite activity, but it can be very messy ‚Äî and clothes get destroyed. So, to keep your little one‚Äôs outfit nice and clean, use a plastic bag as an apron for them. Toddlers tend to drop their pacifiers all the time, and once the pacifier is down, it needs to be cleaned. To prevent that from happening, tie the pacifier on a balloon. You can use a closet organizer and label it for each day of the week to make sure that picking outfits for the day won‚Äôt take hours. Watch until the end to discover all the genius parenting hacks you need to know.

snippet.title: CID (Bengali) - ý¶∏ýßÄý¶Üý¶áý¶°ýßÄ - At The Store - Full Episode
snippet.description:
Click to watch all the episodes of CID - 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL5O3zv2ZcASgNl2V1M1Y8fEFWuo4_wIXb

Episode 409 : At The Store
-------------------------------------------
Three Friends - one blind, one mute, and one deaf are at a grocery store when they witness a crime taking place. A woman wearing a burkha and carrying a child is being chased by another man when impulsively she gives the baby to the deaf guy and leaves the store. The friends call CID, confused about what they should do. 

About CID:
--------------------
CID is an Indian detective television anthology series about India's Crime Investigation Department, created by B. P. Singh for Sony Entertainment Television India and Sony Entertainment Television Asia.  Following a pilot episode on 29 April 1997, the series premiered on 21 January 1998 and is the longest-running television series in India, having completed 19 years in January 2017 and entering the 20th year of its run. The show airs on Saturday and Sunday nights at 10:30 PM IST.

snippet.title: ý¶Öý¶¶ýßçý¶≠ýßÅý¶§ ý¶¶ýßçý¶¨ýßÄý¶™ýßá ý¶§ýßåý¶πý¶øý¶¶ ý¶Üý¶´ýßçý¶∞ý¶øý¶¶ý¶ø | Munshiganj | Mawa Ghat | Tawhid Afridi | Vlog 79
snippet.description:
TAWHID AFRIDI - BIKRAMPUR - MUNSHIGANJ - MAWA GHAT - PADMA BRIDGE - ý¶§ýßåý¶πý¶øý¶¶ ý¶Üý¶´ýßçý¶∞ý¶øý¶¶ý¶ø - ý¶¶ýßçý¶¨ýßÄý¶™

In this vlog we showed the beauty of Munshiganj like Mawa Ghat, Padma Bridge, Ilish or Hilsa Fish & Dhaka Mawa Highway.

Edited By : Mahabub Hasan Murad
Color Grading : Hayat Mahmud

MUNSHIGANJ :-
Munshiganj, also historically known as Bikrampur, is a district in central Bangladesh. It is a part of the Dhaka Division and borders Dhaka District.

PADMA BRIDGE :-
The Padma Multipurpose Bridge is a multipurpose road-rail bridge across the Padma River, the main distributary of Ganges, under construction in Bangladesh with its own resources. It will connect Louhajong, Munshiganj to Shariatpur and Madaripur, linking the south-west of the country, to northern and eastern regions.

ILISH / HILSA :-
The ilish, also known as the ilisha, hilsa, hilsa herring or hilsa shad, is a species of fish related to the herring, in the family Clupeidae. It is a very popular and sought-after food fish in the Indian Subcontinent. The most famous hilsha fish comes from Chandpur District, Bangladesh.

Synopsis:
The story revolves around a village which is divided into half by Telugu and Tamil people. Hari (Naga Shaurya) gets dragged into it as he joins a college in that village. He falls for Karthika (Rashmika Mandanna). After some comedy scenes she starts to like him and soon reciprocates it. But his life takes a new turn when he discovers that she is a Tamilian from this village. There on follows comedy of errors and finally a happy ending with an unexpected twist.

One fine day, he comes to know about his dad's past which is related back to a huge family based in India.In order to fulfill his dad's dream, Abhiram lands in India. There he finds out that his roots are based in the joint family of Balaraju. Rest of the story is as to how Abhiram manages to successfully enter the family, and wins the love of everyone.

snippet.title: Godzilla vs. Kong ‚Äì Official Trailer
snippet.description:
In theaters and streaming exclusively on @HBOMax* March 26.
¬Ý
*Available on @HBOMax in the US only, for 31 days, at no extra cost to subscribers.

https://www.godzillavskong.com/
https://www.facebook.com/GodzillaVsKong
https://www.instagram.com/godzillavskong/
https://twitter.com/GodzillaVsKong

---

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes the long-awaited face-off between two icons, ‚ÄúGodzilla vs. Kong,‚Äù the next epic adventure in Legendary‚Äôs cinematic Monsterverse, directed by Adam Wingard.

Legends collide in ‚ÄúGodzilla vs. Kong‚Äù as these mythic adversaries meet in a spectacular battle for the ages, with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.  Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home, and with them is Jia, a young orphaned girl with whom he has formed a unique and powerful bond.  But they unexpectedly find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla, cutting a swath of destruction across the globe.  The epic clash between the two titans‚Äîinstigated by unseen forces‚Äîis only the beginning of the mystery that lies deep within the core of the Earth.

The film stars Alexander Skarsg√•rd (‚ÄúBig Little Lies,‚Äù ‚ÄúThe Little Drummer Girl‚Äù), Millie Bobby Brown (‚ÄúStranger Things‚Äù), Rebecca Hall (‚ÄúChristine,‚Äù ‚ÄúProfessor Marston and the Wonder Women‚Äù), Brian Tyree Henry (‚ÄúJoker,‚Äù ‚ÄúSpider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse‚Äù), Shun Oguri (‚ÄúWeathering with You‚Äù), Eiza Gonz√°lez (‚ÄúFast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw‚Äù), Julian Dennison (‚ÄúDeadpool 2‚Äù), with Kyle Chandler (‚ÄúGodzilla: King of the Monsters‚Äù) and Demi√°n Bichir (‚ÄúThe Nun,‚Äù ‚ÄúThe Hateful Eight‚Äù).

Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home, and with them is Jia, a young orphaned girl with whom he has formed a unique and powerful bond.  But they unexpectedly find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla, cutting a swath of destruction across the globe. snippet.title: Drunk N High (Official Video) Mellow D, Aastha Gill | Adah Sharma | Akull | VYRLOriginals | New Song
snippet.description:
VYRL Originals brings to you 2021's biggest party anthem - Drunk n High by hitmaker Mellow D & Aastha Gill starring Bollywood actress Adah Sharma for a one of a kind collaboration. The song has been composed by Akull and Mellow D, lyrics have been written by Mellow D and music video is a fun and quirky storyline directed by Robby Singh.

This party banger song is sure to set you in a mood to celebrate and lift your spirits this new year. Watch the video till the end to see @Adah Sharma  in her element ;).

snippet.title: COBRA GIRL 2021 - New Hollywood Hindi Dubbed Action Movie | #Latest Released Hindi Dubbed Movie 2021
snippet.description:
Summaries:
Chanachol, recently returned to Thailand after living overseas, signs up for a tour to get back in touch with Thai culture, and finds himself attracted to the tour guide, Mekhala. There are several problems with the relationship: Chanachol is married, with family, and Mekhala has a mysterious, symbiotic relationship with a deadly cobra, and many of her previous suitors have ended up dead.
Director: M.L. Pundhevanop Dhewakul
Stars: Shahkrit Yamnarm, Karnpitchar Ketmanee, Jiravich Pongpaijit

A B O U T  N T V 
From unbiased and comprehensive News to Entertainment programs, International Television Channel Ltd. (NTV) has maintained its flagship position across all verticals since its beginning and became one of the most popular TV channels in Bangladesh. With the slogan ‚ÄòSomoyer Sathe Agamir Pothe‚Äô meaning ‚Äòheading towards the future with time‚Äô, holding Bangla language and culture close to heart, Al-haj Mohammad Mosaddak Ali founded NTV on 3 July 2003.
NTV offers diverse mix of programs such as news bulletins, current affairs, talk shows, soap operas, educational, religious, politics related programs, drama, movie, reality shows and other entertainment programs. NTV delivers reliable information across all platforms: TV, Digital platform (ntvbd.com) and Mobile. Apart from Bangladesh, NTV broadcasts its programmes in UK, USA, Canada, some parts of Europe, Middle East, and beyond. Enjoy and stay connected with us!!!

snippet.title: Military takes power in Myanmar, Aung San Suu Kyi detained
snippet.description:
Myanmar leader Aung San Suu Kyi and other senior figures from the ruling party have been detained in an early morning raid. 
The military declares a state of emergency following days of escalating tension between the civilian government and the powerful military, which claims the November election was tainted by fraud. 
 
Al Jazeera‚Äôs Victoria Gatenby reports.

snippet.title: India claim stunning series win, end Australia's Gabba streak | Vodafone Test Series 2020-21
snippet.description:
Rishabh Pant was the hero as an injury-ravaged India ended Australia's 32-year undefeated run at the Gabba, executing a record-breaking final day chase to win the Test by three wickets and the series 2-1.

Watch The Late Late Show with James Corden weeknights at 12:35 AM ET/11:35 PM CT. Only on CBS.

Get new episodes of shows you love across devices the next day, stream live TV, and watch full seasons of CBS fan favorites anytime, anywhere with CBS All Access. Try it free! http://bit.ly/1OQA29B

---
Each week night, THE LATE LATE SHOW with JAMES CORDEN throws the ultimate late night after party with a mix of celebrity guests, edgy musical acts, games and sketches. Corden differentiates his show by offering viewers a peek behind-the-scenes into the green room, bringing all of his guests out at once and lending his musical and acting talents to various sketches. Additionally, bandleader Reggie Watts and the house band provide original, improvised music throughout the show. Since Corden took the reigns as host in March 2015, he has quickly become known for generating buzzworthy viral videos, such as Carpool Karaoke."

snippet.title: 23 SMART LIFE HACKS FOR EVERY OCCASION
snippet.description:
Ways to make your life easier with these fantastic hacks. 

As we go through life, we come across little problems that seem unsolvable. But today, we‚Äôre going to show you some fun tricks you can try that will help save you time and hassle. Like when you have to sign a bunch of documents all at once. One way to fix that is to tape some pens on a piece of paper (Somewhat diagonally) and then use them to write. Now let‚Äôs head to the kitchen, where you need to make perfectly round crepes for your guests. You don‚Äôt need to buy an expensive crepe tool that flattens them out and turns them into a perfect circle ‚Äî you just need a chopstick or a skewer instead. You break it in the middle, create a 90-degree angle, and voila. Did you know you can use an old highlighter to paint or write stuff down on your tablet? Watch the video to see how to do it.

snippet.title: Gale Lagana Hai - Tony Kakkar & Neha Kakkar | Shivin Narang & Nia Sharma | Anshul Garg
snippet.description:
Anshul Garg presents Gale Lagana Hai by @Tony Kakkar & @Neha Kakkar  ft. Shivin Narang & Nia Sharma 

Singer - Tony Kakkar & Neha Kakkar
Music - Tony Kakkar 
Lyrics - Tony Kakkar
Song Arranged & Programmed by Rakesh Chary & Tony Kakkar
Flute - Naveen
Guitars - Shomu Seal
Violin - Kailash Patra

Featuring - Shivin Narang & Nia Sharma

Producer - Anshul Garg

Directors - Agam Mann & Azeem Mann
Video Supervisor - Raghav Sharma 
DOP - Shinda Singh
Project Manager - Piyush Chandak
Choreographer - Sumit Kumar
Production - Sai Film Production, Jogi and Fateh Film Production 
DI - Onkar Singh
Stylists - Outro by Akshita and Anulika
Art Director - Rajan and Karma
VFX - Inside Motion Pictures
AD - Ravi Goyal
Artwork - Vicky Sandhu
Distribution - Believe Digital
Promotions - Underdog Digital

Lyrics
HUM BHEEGI BHEEGI RATON MEIN 
TERA INTEZAAR KARTE HAIN
KYA KAHOON TUMHE JAANA JAAN 
KITNA PYAAR KARTE HAIN
DUNIYA NE JO ZAKHM DIYE HAR ZAKHM DIKHANA HAI 
ZARA PAAS TOH AAO GALE LAGANA HAI 
ZARA PAAS TOH AAO GALE LAGANA HAI 
WAQT KA KYA PATA KAB JEENA KAB MAR JAANA HAI 
ZARA PAAS TOH AAO GALE LAGANA HAI 

MERE HAATHON MEIN TERA HAATH HO YAHI MANGOON RAB SE
ZAMANE KO MAIN BHI KAHOON TU MERA HAI HAQ SE
AAKHON SE SHURU JO MOHABAAT HAI USSE DIL TAK JAANA HAI 
ZARA PAAS TOH AAO GALE LAGANA HAI 
MERE PAAS TOH AAO GALE LAGANA HAI 

TUM TUM NAHI HUM HUM NAHI EK JAAN HAIN AB SE 
TADPE HAIN TARSE HAIN TANHA RAHE KABSE
KUCH HI DER KI HAI ZINDGI AUR PHIR MAR JAANA HAI 
ZARA PAAS TOH AAO GALE LAGANA HAI 
ZARA PAAS TOH AAO GALE LAGANA HAI 
GALE LAGANA HAI 




#GaleLaganaHai #Tonykakkar #NehaKakkar

snippet.title: DISNEY PRINCESSES AT SCHOOL! Fun Ways to Sneak Food Into Class & Funny Situations by Crafty Panda
snippet.description:
Hey there, royal Pandas! School life sure is more fun if you have Disney princesses at high school!
